name: Siam Global House Public Company Limited
summary: Siam Global House Public Company Limited retails building materials and home decoration products in Thailand and Kingdom of Cambodia. It offers cements and construction materials; steels, nails, and wires; roofs and installation tools; and tanks, pipes, water systems, and gardening products. The company also provides decorative items, including doors, windows and woods, hardware, electrical accessories, sanitary wares and kitchens, ceramic tiles and decorative items, paints and chemicals, and furniture and appliances. As of December 31, 2020, it operated through a network of 71 branches. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Mueang Roi Et, Thailand.
